description_long: This is a double-headed axe with a robust, ornate design, featuring two large, symmetrical, crescent-shaped blades made of gray metal. The blades are thick and have a beveled edge, giving them a heavy-duty appearance suitable for chopping or splitting. The central shaft is a golden metallic rod with decorative elements, including a pinkish iridescent core and gold fittings at both ends. The handle is cylindrical, straight, and capped with a rounded pommel that has a gem-like accent at the base. The mounting of the blades is reinforced with a central collar and additional gold brackets, suggesting durability and strength. The overall aesthetic is both functional and decorative, making it suitable for display or ceremonial use as well as practical application.
description: A double-headed axe with thick gray metal blades and a gold, ornamented handle featuring a pinkish core and gem-like pommel. The design is both functional and decorative, with reinforced blade mounting.
description_view_0: Front view showing both large, crescent-shaped gray blades and the full length of the ornate gold handle with pinkish core.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the blades and the cylindrical handle, with minimal blade width visible.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the symmetrical double blades and the decorative handle details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin blade profile and the straight handle alignment.
attribute_handle_type: Straight cylindrical handle made of gold-colored metal with a pinkish iridescent core, capped with a rounded pommel and decorative accents.
attribute_blade_design: Double crescent-shaped blades with thick, beveled edges, symmetrical design, and reinforced central mounting collar.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged and collared mounting with visible gold brackets securing the blades to the handle.
